Int.description: Signed 32-bit integer type in the GraphQL type system

Float.description: Signed double-precision floating-point value per IEEE 754

String.description: UTF-8 character sequence representing textual data

Boolean.description: Boolean type with true and false values

ID.description: Unique identifier serialized as a string, used for refetching and caching

Query.description: Root query type defining all available read operations in the schema

Mutation.description: Root mutation type defining all write operations in the schema

Subscription.description: Root subscription type for real-time data pushed from the server
